Write a 200-word abstract for a systematic review answering: "What evidence exists that reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) introduces measurable alignment taxes in large language models?"

- Overview and Definitions: Abstract This paper critically evaluates the attempts to align Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, especially Large Language Models (LLMs)... [2].
